client_construction.code: conn, err := grpc.Dial(target, grpc.WithTransportCredentials(insecure.NewCredentials())); if err != nil { return nil, err }; client := NewServiceClient(conn)

primary_operations.name: Call
primary_operations.sdk_call: resp, err := c.client.Call(context.Background(), &Request{Payload: req}); if err != nil { return nil, err }; return resp.Payload, nil

code_style_notes: grpc.Dial is non-blocking; use grpc.WithBlock() to wait for connection
Use protoc-gen-go to generate the *Client stub from .proto
